accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text; the War Powers Resolution context is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; summary tracks the bill's findings and operative provisions.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose of directing removal of forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes invocation of the War Powers Resolution and related expedited-procedure statutes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately describes the rule-of-construction carve-outs for defense, intelligence, and assistance to Israel and partners.

effective_dates.why: The resolution specifies no effective dates or sunsets to summarize.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the core directive, findings, and exceptions without misrepresentation.

objective_tone.why: Summary is neutral and attributes contested claims to the findings.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent across three clear paragraphs.

concise.why: No padding or repetition; appropriately compact.

correct_entities.why: Operation Epic Fury, Iran, Israel, and War Powers Resolution are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The only figure used, the February 28, 2026 date, matches the bill text.
